collection: format / Selfie Vlogger Front Camera (world travel, mixed styles)

clips.title: Paris, France
clips.prompt: Front-facing vlogger selfie camera held at arm's length, face-lit and confessional, direct eye contact. The shot is filmed selfie-style on a phone mounted on a visible selfie stick held out in front, the extended stick and phone partly in frame. Day. Standing on a terrace with the Eiffel Tower rising in the background against a blue Paris sky. A person in a chic coat talks animatedly to the camera then turns and gestures excitedly back at the tower, wind in their hair. Passing tourists, a coffee cup, soft sun. Natural daylight. Walking-and-talking energy, jump-cut rhythm, 24fps.

clips.title: Cairo, Egypt
clips.prompt: Front-facing vlogger selfie camera held at arm's length, face-lit and confessional, direct eye contact. The shot is filmed as a front-facing selfie with the face large and centered and a slight wide-angle selfie distortion, no selfie stick or holding arm visible in frame. Bright day. Standing on desert sand with the Great Pyramids of Giza towering behind under a hazy sky. A person in light travel clothes and sunglasses talks to the camera, then sweeps an arm back toward the pyramids, grinning in awe. Blowing sand, a distant camel, heat shimmer. Harsh sun. Walking-and-talking energy, jump-cut rhythm, 24fps.
